title: Jamaican Ham Wrap
description: A simple and flavorful wrap filled with juicy ham, crispy vegetables, and a hint of Jamaican spices.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add a small amount of oil and cook the ham slices for 2-3 minutes on each side, until lightly browned.
Add the Jamaican seasoning and stir to combine.
Add the shredded lettuce and sliced cucumber to the pan and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Warm the wraps according to package instructions.
Assemble the wraps by placing a few slices of the ham mixture onto the center of each wrap.
Top with crispy onions and a dollop of mayonnaise or mustard (if using).
